headline: Olympia Financial Group Inc. Announces Closing of Previously Announced Sale of Olympia Currency and Global Payments Inc.
summary: Calgary, Alberta--(Newsfile Corp. - April 15, 2026) - Olympia Financial Group Inc. (TSX: OLY) ("Olympia") is pleased to announce that, further to its previous announcement on March 16, 2026, Olympia has closed the sale of Olympia Currency and Global Payments Inc. to Shift Connect Ltd. About Olympia Financial Group Inc.Olympia Financial Group Inc. ("OFGI") conducts most of its operations through its subsidiary Olympia Trust Company, a non-deposit taking trust company.
